text: The Migdal stone—a temple artifact likely associated with Jesus's era—contains an encoded model of the astrological universe with precise planetary positions from April 17, 6 BCE, demonstrating that Greek astronomical knowledge was embedded in Jewish cultic practice.
quote: the migdal stone models a universe that represents exactly the same planetary positions and sky that happened on April 17th 6 BCE...the menorah literally represents all the Heavenly lights occupying only the constellations Taurus Aries and Pisces

text: Anointing-and-ascension deification pattern in Mediterranean sources (Venus anointing Aeneas, becoming god and ascending) paralleling baptism as succession/deification mechanism.
quote: She bathed... wash away from Anias all his mortal part... touched his lips with ambrosia and sweet nectar mixed and so made him a god... He becomes Jupiter indigenous

text: Jewish mosaics from the Johannine period portray Mary Magdalene alongside Jesus using solar-lunar imagery (Jesus as sun, Mary Magdalene as moon), suggesting her role as a significant figure in Jewish-Christian religious symbolism contemporary with the Gospel accounts.
quote: a 6th Century Mosaic in beichan that portrays Jesus Christ and Mary Magdalene in its Central roundel as the sun and the moon
